title: festuca rubra subsp. juncea
intro: Festuca rubra subsp. juncea, also known as red fescue, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Festuca rubra subsp. juncea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
